Authority: Ministry of Development, Public Works and Administration (MDLPA)
Mandate and Responsibilities: Lead regulator; adopts secondary legislation and MEPS thresholds; defines compliance rules, exemptions and safeguards per Art. 17(19); oversees national EPC registry and QA.

Authority: MDLPA, MIPE, Ministry of Energy / Environment Fund Administration (AFM)
Mandate and Responsibilities: Designs and disburses enabling finance aligned to MEPS milestones (worst-performers priority); ensures complementarity with RES/H&C funds.
Sets metering/billing rules, grid-connection simplifications, and BACS/SRI alignment where relevant; supports data access for monitoring.
Local enforcement and owner engagement; maintain local registries for targeted outreach; integrate MEPS with local H&C planning (EED Art. 25).
Recognizes compliance evidence (EPC or equivalent), manages audits and sanctions for false declarations; ensures quality assurance and sampling.
Frontline assistance to owners/HOAs: diagnostics, package selection, permits, finance applications, contractor matchmaking; special lanes for vulnerable groups.
